name: Bhanu Bhakta Joshi
profileSummary: Bhanu Bhakta Joshi is a Nepalese politician, belonging to the CPN. In the 2008 Constituent Assembly election he was elected from the Bajhang-1 constituency, winning 13,955 votes and in 1994 Nepalese general election he was elected from Bajhang 1 (constituency), winning 12,603 votes. He also served as Minister for Forests and Soil Conservation in Jhalanath Khanal cabinet.
